mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_org WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_org WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_org (name, doctor, org_type, factors, cost_per_person, contract_end, target_count, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{name}, #{doctor}, #{orgType}, #{factors}, #{costPerPerson}, #{contractEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, #{targetCount}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_org SET name = #{name}, doctor = #{doctor}, org_type = #{orgType}, factors = #{factors}, cost_per_person = #{costPerPerson}, contract_end = #{contractEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, target_count = #{targetCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_org SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
